database.name: VIEW SSWCL_BINNACLE_V
database.view: SELECT sswos_binnacle.sswos_binnacle_id AS sswcl_binnacle_v_id, sswos_binnacle.sswos_binnacle_id, sswos_binnacle.ad_client_id, '0' AS ad_org_id, sswos_binnacle.isactive, sswos_binnacle.created, sswos_binnacle.createdby, sswos_binnacle.updated, sswos_binnacle.updatedby, sswos_binnacle.status_from, sswos_binnacle.status_to, sswos_binnacle.atindpo_postventa_id, sswos_binnacle.issummary, sswos_binnacle.em_sswon_emailsent AS sswcl_sswon_emailsent, sswos_binnacle.atindpo_postventa_id AS sswcl_work_order_v_id FROM sswos_binnacle
